text:
Lily was fascinated by astrology. She believed that people had such peculiar personalities guided by the stars. One night, as the clock approached midnight, she flipped through her favorite astrological magazine, eager to read about another sign's personality traits.

She opened the page for Sagittarius—the Archer—and there it was written, bold as day: "Archer-like, adventurous, and always on the move!"

Lily had never met a Sagittarius before, but she imagined them as explorers with broad horizons, embarking on grand quests. She felt a spark of excitement, imagining herself on some distant journey.

As the hours passed, Lily lost track of time, flipping through magazines, dreaming of traveling the world. Her dog, Winston, barked insistently from the porch. Intrigued by Winston's persistent wakefulness, she thought about her adventure.

Her dreams turned to reality as she packed her bag. Today was the day. She made a quick call to her best friend who
